onset.Description: Event time-stamp relative to onset of the MEG recording (first sample in MEG recording corresponds to t=0)

duration.Description: Event duration. All events are treated as impulse events with zero duration.

channel.Description: MEG channel associated with the event

Levels.UPPT001: This channel contains events related to practice trial start triggers only
Levels.n/a: Any events not directly recorded in the MEG file (e.g - all KeyDown events)

onset_sample_idx.Description: The MEG data sample index corresponding to the event timestamp. NaN values indicate that the event occurred either prior to initiation or following termination of the MEG recording.

event_type.Description: The type of task event recorded

Levels.KeyDown: Button press event. The timestamp corresponds to the KeyDown time.
Levels.StartPractice: The beginning of an individual practice trial (~10s duration).
Levels.StopPractice: The end of an individual practice trial.
Levels.StartRest: The beginning of an individual rest break (~10s duration).
Levels.StopRest: The end of an individual rest break.

target_sequence.Description: The 5-item sequence displayed on the screen during an individual trial that the participant is instructed to repeatedly type. XXXXX is always displayed during the rest break.

keypress_id.Description: The number code of the button associated with the KeyDown event (i.e. - button-press)

Levels.1: Button pressed with the Little finger
Levels.2: Button pressed with the Ring finger
Levels.3: Button pressed with the Middle finger
Levels.4: Button pressed with the Index finger
Levels.n/a: Events not associated with button presses (e.g. - practice trial start/stop triggers)

finger_label.Description: The finger used to generate each KeyDown event

Levels.Little: Button pressed with the Little finger
Levels.Ring: Button pressed with the Ring finger
Levels.Middle: Button pressed with the Middle finger
Levels.Index: Button pressed with the Index finger
Levels.n/a: Events not associated with button presses (e.g. - practice trial start/stop triggers)

trial_number.Description: The trial number individual events are associated with
